title: Azure
description: A complete path through Microsoft Azure: cloud foundations, accounts and subscriptions, Microsoft Entra ID, governance and management, compute, containers and Kubernetes, storage, networking, databases, application integration and messaging, security, monitoring, infrastructure as code and DevOps, data and analytics, AI and machine learning, web and mobile, IoT, migration and hybrid, cost management, the Well-Architected and Cloud Adoption Frameworks, advanced multi-region and resiliency topics, and certifications.
